patch.value: pm install <invalid> lacks did-you-mean for built-in aliases

Dogfood 2026-05-17: `pm install nonexistent` treats every name as a filesystem path: `Local extension source does not exist: "<cwd>/<name>"`. Built-in packages calendar/templates/guide-shell/todos/etc. should be suggested via fuzzy match when the name is close to a known alias. Improves agent recovery.

Deferring: low impact vs effort. Built-in alias fuzzy match would require enumerating bundled package catalog and computing distance. Track as future enhancement; current Local extension source does not exist error is acceptable and unambiguous.

author: codex-agent
